---
Suite
---
!***> Set up FitNesse test data

!| RememberRecordState |
| forgetAllRecords? |
| OK |

!| RememberRecordState |
| type           | id                | version    | remember? |
| user           | 121212            | beforeTest | OK        |
| user           | 131313            | beforeTest | OK        |
| permissionRole | ${fitnesseTextAdminId} | beforeTest | OK        |

!include -seamless .HelperPages.Data.ExamplesPool

!| RememberRecordState |
| type       | id                         | version  | remember? |
| user       | 121212                     | test     | OK        |
| user       | 131313                     | test     | OK        |
| recordType | ${fitnesseRecordTypeId}         | original | OK        |
| metadata   | ${fitnesseGroupId}              | original | OK        |
| metadata   | ${fitnesseRecordInfoGroupId}    | original | OK        |
| metadata   | ${fitnesseRecordInfoNewGroupId} | original | OK        |
*!
